title: AutoTexture
description: A very simple mod to fix a very specific issue: switching blocks while texturing builds.
body:
This mod aims to help texturing a build, such as switching randomly between stone, cobblestone and andesite. or blackstone and gilded blackstone.

# Usage:
- Press hotkey to activate (usually h);
## There are two modes:
- hotbar swap (change selected slot in hotbar)
- column swap (swap stack with another one in the same column;

## Commands:
- `/toggle_swap_mode`:
  change between hotbar and column swap
- `/set_swap_speed`:
  set the speed of swapping (default=1 tick)
